parameters.name: Ingest @tag-event headers
parameters.description: Scan every script under guild/Enterprise/L3/scripts for a @tag-event JSON block (delimited by `# @tag-event` / `# @end-tag-event`) and store each declaration as a row in tag.db → script_events. The state-machine runner picks these up on the next fire_event/tick, so no generated Script UDT JSON files are needed.
